description_long: This is a modern, expansive house set within a walled property, featuring multiple interconnected structures and lush landscaping. The main building is complemented by two smaller outbuildings with dark gable roofs, and the property includes a large rectangular swimming pool, manicured lawns, and paved walkways. The house showcases a flat roof design with clean lines, large windows, and several outdoor terraces and patios. Trees and shrubs are strategically placed around the perimeter and within the yard, providing privacy and greenery. The front of the property is defined by a wide driveway and a prominent entry gate, leading to a paved approach. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with a focus on open spaces, geometric forms, and integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, multi-structure house with flat and gable roofs, large windows, landscaped gardens, and a swimming pool, all enclosed within a walled property. The design emphasizes open spaces, clean lines, and contemporary outdoor living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, entry gate, and the arrangement of trees and outbuildings flanking the central house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated layout, the lawn, pool, and the relationship between the main house and outbuildings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, extensive patio areas, and the open lawn bordered by trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, garden, and the secondary access path leading to the rear of the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Wide, prominent entry gate with paved driveway, minimal steps, and a modern door flanked by landscaping and open patio space
